narrative:
Clinton County has 27,050 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.7% of registrants.
